title: HoloGui
description: HoloGui is an immersive way to add holographic gui's to Minecraft
body:
# HoloGui

This is a mod that supports adding holographic gui's to Minecraft. These gui's can be used to interface with blocks or also as standalone gui's (for example when pressing a hotkey). It is also possible to mount holographic gui's to other entities. There gui's provide an immersive way for a player to do various things.

This mod has been created as a spinoff from the [Ariente](https://modrinth.com/mod/ariente) mod. On its own this mod doesn't do anything useful. It needs other mods to add support for its API.

WARNING! This mod is still beta and as such the API can still change! Be aware of that.
